footer.brandText: Redefining the boundaries of Khmer gastronomy through a commitment to heritage and innovation.
footer.copyright: © 2024 One More Restaurant. All Rights Reserved.

hero.description: Traditional Cambodian flavors served in a modern dining experience.

signature.title: Featured Khmer Cuisine
signature.description: Each dish tells a story of Cambodia's culinary heritage, crafted with heirloom recipes and seasonal ingredients.

kuyteavOneMore.name: One More Special Kuyteav
kuyteavOneMore.description: Rich bone broth with rice noodles, sliced meats, meatballs, fresh herbs and crisp bean sprouts.

kuyteavMincedPork.name: Minced Pork Kuyteav
kuyteavMincedPork.description: Flavorful rice noodles in pork broth topped with perfectly seasoned minced pork and fresh chives.

hainanChickenRice.name: Hainan Chicken Thigh Rice
hainanChickenRice.description: Fragrant seasoned rice served with crispy golden-fried chicken thigh and homemade dipping sauce.

porkBloodPorridge.name: Pork Blood Porridge
porkBloodPorridge.description: Hearty and comforting rice porridge simmered with pork blood, offal, ginger and green scallions.

lortchaEgg.name: Lort Cha with Beef & Egg
lortchaEgg.description: Stir-fried pin-noodles with tender beef, chives and bean sprouts, topped with a fried egg.

friedRicePineapple.name: Pineapple Fried Rice
friedRicePineapple.description: Golden fried rice served in fresh pineapple with prawns, cashews, and aromatic Khmer seasoning.

fishAmokCoconut.name: Fish Amok in Coconut
fishAmokCoconut.description: Tender river fish fillets steamed in a rich, kaffir lime infused lemongrass curry mousse inside a fresh young coconut.

sourSeafoodSoup.name: Sour Seafood Soup
sourSeafoodSoup.description: Traditional hot and sour seafood soup loaded with prawns, mushrooms and fragrant herbs.

panFriedFishPaste.name: Pan-fried Fish Paste with Fresh Vegetables
panFriedFishPaste.description: Golden pan-fried fish paste served with a colorful selection of crisp fresh vegetables.

grilledChickenSiemReap.name: Siem Reap Grilled Chicken
grilledChickenSiemReap.description: Whole local chicken marinated in traditional Cambodian herbs and slow-grilled to smoky perfection.

stirFriedBokchoy.name: Stir-fried Bok Choy
stirFriedBokchoy.description: Crisp bok choy greens stir-fried in a roaring wok with garlic and savory oyster sauce.

friedFermentedEgg.name: Fried Egg with Salted Fish
friedFermentedEgg.description: Traditional Cambodian dish of eggs fried with aromatic salted fish (Trey Pror-ma) and pork.

spaces.title: Designed for Every Occasion
spaces.description: From family meals to private celebrations, our spaces blend Cambodian warmth with refined comfort.

family.name: Indoor Dining Space
family.description: A beautifully designed indoor dining area featuring our signature wooden wave architecture, offering a comfortable and stylish setting for your meals.

privateRoom.name: Private Dining Room
privateRoom.description: An intimate room for birthdays, business dinners, and special moments that deserve privacy.

business.name: Business Dining Area
business.description: A calm and polished environment for client meetings, team meals, and formal dining.

kidZone.name: Kid-Friendly Corner
kidZone.description: A comfortable area where families can enjoy meals while children feel welcome and safe.

event.name: Outdoor Dining Space
event.description: A beautifully landscaped open-air garden terrace, ideal for al fresco dining and elegant outdoor dining.

locations.title: Visit One More Restaurant
locations.description: Choose the branch that best fits your dining occasion.

gallery.title: Moments at One More
gallery.description: A glimpse into our food, spaces, and hospitality.

images.one: Dining room at One More Restaurant

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.description: Experiences shared by our valued customers.

sophea.text: The food felt deeply Cambodian but presented with a modern touch. The service was warm, thoughtful, and professional.

david.text: A beautiful place for dinner with clients. The private room was quiet, elegant, and the dishes were excellent.

piseth.text: One of the best places in Phnom Penh for family dining. Great atmosphere, good food, and friendly staff.

emma.text: The restaurant has a wonderful balance of tradition and comfort. I loved the Khmer flavors and the calm interior.

partners.title: Companies We Work With
partners.description: Trusted relationships that help us create better experiences for every guest.

hero.title: Our Menu
hero.subtitle: Traditional Cambodian flavors served with modern warmth and refined presentation.

breakfast.name: Kuyteav Phnom Penh
breakfast.desc: A classic Cambodian breakfast noodle soup featuring chewy rice noodles in a rich pork broth, topped with sliced pork, meatballs, and fresh herbs.

breakfast.name: Bean Sprout Fried Noodles
breakfast.desc: Stir-fried yellow noodles tossed with crisp bean sprouts, garlic, green chives, and savory soy seasoning, served with a house sweet chili sauce.

breakfast.name: Beef Fried Kuyteav
breakfast.desc: Stir-fried flat rice noodles cooked in a roaring wok with tender slices of beef, Chinese broccoli, eggs, and a caramelized sweet soy sauce.

breakfast.name: Seafood Fried Noodles
breakfast.desc: A delightful mix of fresh river shrimp, squid, and seasonal vegetables stir-fried with wheat noodles in a savory oyster-garlic sauce.

breakfast.name: Pork Bone Kuyteav Soup
breakfast.desc: Comforting rice noodle soup served with slow-simmered meaty pork ribs, roasted garlic oil, scallions, and crisp bean sprouts.

breakfast.name: Meatball Kuyteav
breakfast.desc: Savory Khmer noodle soup loaded with house-made beef meatballs, fresh herbs, lime, and chili paste in a clear, sweet bone broth.

lunch.name: Fish Amok in Coconut
lunch.desc: Tender snakehead fish fillets coated in a rich Lemongrass Kroeung curry paste and coconut cream, gently steamed inside a fresh young coconut.

lunch.name: Banana Blossom Chicken Salad
lunch.desc: Shredded chicken breast tossed with crisp banana blossom, red bell peppers, fragrant Khmer herbs, and a tangy lime-chili dressing.

lunch.name: Stir-Fried Cockles in Tamarind
lunch.desc: Fresh local cockles wok-tossed in a sweet, sour, and mildly spicy tamarind sauce, garnished with aromatic holy basil.

lunch.name: Beef Lok Lak
lunch.desc: Stir-fried marinated beef cubes served on a bed of fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions, accompanied by a traditional Kampot pepper-lime dipping sauce.

dinner.name: Charred Chili Lobster
dinner.desc: Fresh local lobster wok-fried with garlic, chili, sweet onions, and a rich oyster-tamarind reduction, served with Kampot pepper lime dip.

dinner.name: Samlor Korko with Catfish
dinner.desc: A nourishing traditional Khmer green stew with catfish fillets, roasted ground rice, green papaya, pumpkin, eggplant, and mixed organic leafy greens.

dinner.name: Traditional Fish Amok
dinner.desc: A timeless Cambodian treasure — tender river fish steamed within a banana leaf parcel, enveloped in a velvety coconut-lemongrass curry mousse.

dessert.name: Five Signature Dessert Platter
dessert.desc: A beautiful platter featuring a selection of classic Cambodian sweet treats, including pumpkin custard, sticky rice, and coconut jellies.

dessert.name: Nom Krok (Coconut Pancakes)
dessert.desc: Crispy, sweet, and custardy coconut rice pancakes made in a traditional cast-iron mold, served hot with a sweet coconut dipping cream.

drinks.name: Lemongrass Infused Iced Tea
drinks.desc: Chilled house-brewed black tea infused with fresh lemongrass stalks, kaffir lime leaves, and organic honey.

drinks.name: Wine
drinks.desc: Discover our curated selection of wines, carefully chosen to complement the rich flavors of Cambodian cuisine.

header.title: Every Location Has Its Own Story.
header.desc: Every location offers a serene atmosphere and preserves Cambodian heritage, set within a welcoming space designed to feel like home.

findUs.title: Find us here
findUs.description: Two distinct dining destinations, one unforgettable culinary story.

map.title: See us on Map
map.description: Two distinct dining destinations, one unforgettable culinary story.

locations.name: One More Restaurant Toul Kork
locations.description: Our signature branch in Toul Kork offers a beautiful garden dining experience and elegant private rooms. Features a layout designed for family gatherings, professional business meetings, and celebrations.
highlights: 6 Private VIP Rooms with full AV setup
Dedicated kids play zone for family comfort

locations.name: One More Restaurant Boeung Kak
locations.description: Our Boeung Kak branch showcases striking modern architectural design and expansive layouts. An ideal setting for large-scale corporate events, banquets, and memorable dining experiences.
highlights: Large event space with stage & sound system

summary.title: Booking Summary
summary.arrivalNotice: Please arrive 10 mins early. Reservations are held for 15 mins after the scheduled time.

items.a: We recommend smart casual attire. Traditional Khmer attire is also very welcome for special occasions.
Yes, we have variety of vegetarian and subject to pre-order and has to mention in the special request.

items.q: Is there parking available at the branches?
items.a: Yes, both our Toul Kork and Boeung Kak branches feature spacious, secure parking lots with complimentary valet service.

items.q: Can I bring my own wine?
items.a: Yes, you may bring your own wine. A corkage fee of USD 20 per bottle applies.
To ensure a comfortable dining environment for all guests, pets are only allowed in our outdoor garden areas.

toulKork.title: One More Restaurant Toul Kork
toulKork.desc: A premium dining destination designed for family gatherings and business meetings, serving the finest Cambodian heritage cuisine.

boeungKak.title: One More Restaurant Boeung Kak
boeungKak.desc: A premium dining destination designed for family gatherings and business meetings, serving the finest Cambodian heritage cuisine.

philosophy.title: The Art of Cambodian Hospitality
philosophy.toulKorkDesc: One More Toul Kork was created to honor the rich culinary traditions of Cambodia while offering a modern, elevated dining atmosphere. From hand-selected local ingredients to meticulously crafted dishes, our chef and hospitality team take pride in serving genuine Khmer heritage on every plate. Step in, relax, and let us share our love for great food and authentic Cambodian hospitality with you.
philosophy.boeungKakDesc: One More Boeung Kak. Built upon our deep reverence for Cambodian culinary heritage, this new location expands our mission to showcase the depth, richness, and beauty of authentic Khmer cuisine within a sleek, modern contemporary atmosphere. From carefully sourced local ingredients to time-honored cooking techniques, every dish is prepared by our chef and culinary team with precision and heart.

friedNoodle.name: Onemore Fried Noodle
friedNoodle.desc: Golden grilled chicken served over wok-fried noodles with crisp bean sprouts, chives, and savory house seasoning.

fishAmok.name: Fish Amok in Young Coconut
fishAmok.desc: Tender fish steamed with coconut cream, Khmer kroeung, and kaffir lime, served in a fresh young coconut.

grilledChicken.name: Grilled Chicken with Siem Reap Style
grilledChicken.desc: Whole local chicken marinated in traditional Cambodian herbs and slow-grilled to smoky perfection.

toulKork.name: Sovan Dara
toulKork.text: An absolute gem in Toul Kork. The traditional architecture is stunning, and the private rooms are perfect for business dinners. The service is top-notch.

toulKork.name: Vichea Pok
toulKork.text: The best place to experience authentic Khmer fine dining. Beautiful garden setting and the Amok Trey is outstanding. Highly recommended!

toulKork.name: Chanthy Chea
toulKork.text: Excellent venue for corporate events. We hosted a seminar in their VIP room, and the AV setup and catering exceeded our expectations.

form.title: Inquiry Form

placeholders.name: Enter full name
placeholders.requirements: Tell us more about your event...

form.success: ✓ Thank you! Our team will reach out within 24 hours.

items.q: How far in advance should I book my event?
items.a: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for smaller events and 3–6 months for large weddings or corporate functions. This ensures your preferred date and space are available.

items.q: What is your minimum guest count for private events?
items.a: Our private VIP suite accommodates 8–30 guests. The Grand Ballroom is ideal for 40–120 guests. For smaller intimate dinners, we can arrange semi-private sections starting from 6 guests.

items.q: Can I bring my own cake or decoration items?
items.a: Yes! You are welcome to bring your own cake and personal decorations. Our team will help set everything up at no additional charge. A small corkage fee may apply for external beverages.

items.q: What is the cancellation and deposit policy?
items.a: A 30% deposit secures your event date. Full cancellations made more than 14 days before the event receive a full deposit refund. Cancellations within 14 days forfeit the deposit.

finalCta.title: Ready To Plan Your Event?
finalCta.desc: Contact our team today and let's bring your vision to life.
